news.t: How To Find The Best Sector ETFs 1Q24
How To Find The Best Sector ETFs 3Q23

holdings.infoBox: FUTY is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are NextEra Energy stock at 11.51%, The Southern Company at 6.80%, Duke Energy at 6.28%, Constellation Energy at 5.28%, and American Electric Power Company at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Utilities Index ETF (FUTY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA IMI Utilities 25/50 index. The fund tracks the MSCI US IMI Utilities 25/50 Index, a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the US utilities sector. FUTY was launched on Oct 21, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: How To Find The Best Sector ETFs 1Q24
data.text: With an ever-growing list of similar-sounding ETFs to choose from, finding the best is an increasingly difficult task. How can investors change the game to shift the odds in their favor?

data.title: Best Value ETFs for Q1 2020
data.text: The best value ETFs of Q1 2020 are HEWY, XLU, and FUTY.
